name: Rook
lore_text:
Rook — Heroes of Stone/Veil Duality.
A rare presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Stone/Veil sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Basic Initiative (3)
🛡️ Guard 4 • ⚔️ First Strike 3
Reduces first incoming hit by 40%; Shrouded on entry; adjacent enemies −1 accuracy; End step: pay 1 supply or take 2 recoil.
• Count resources; burst then rotate.
• Pair with allies that cover your weakest stat.
• Trade only when your initiative window is open.
